metadata.description: Recursive Language Model plugin for Claude Code — large-context processing, documentation, planning, TDD implementation, bugfixing, and code quality analysis with built-in guardrail hooks.

plugins.name: rlm
plugins.description: Agentic workflow framework built on Recursive Language Models (RLM). 20 skills for large-context processing, documentation, planning, TDD implementation, end-to-end bugfixing, and code quality analysis. Includes guardrail hooks enforcing recursive delegation limits.
